constraints: The diagnostic must not change prompt selection or provider behavior.
Implementation must not claim automatic L0 retrieval until that behavior exists.
Governed improvement work should proceed only after PLAN admission.
next_action: Seek CADM-PLAN admission before implementing the diagnostic.
objective: Create a read-only diagnostic for possible automatic L0 discovery candidates.
proposed_change: Add a diagnostic surface that reports possible candidate sources for future automatic L0 discovery without changing prompt selection.
rationale: GAP-0001 identifies automatic L0 discovery as missing.
The current system supports explicit L0 inclusion but should not overclaim automatic retrieval.
A read-only diagnostic is a safe first slice before any provider prompt behavior changes.
risk: The diagnostic could be misread as automatic retrieval unless output labels remain explicit about read-only candidate reporting.
success_criteria: The diagnostic reports candidate source records without modifying selected context.
The diagnostic output distinguishes candidates from included prompt context.
SELF_MODEL.json includes the proposed PLAN record after regeneration.
title: Read-only L0 candidate diagnostics
